width.$description: Fluid width of the hero chat-preview card (and its two-column grid track): 540px max above the medium breakpoint (~1024px), scaling down to a 420px floor through the medium band; capped to 100% on the narrowest phones. Kept in lockstep with chat-preview.font (30x ratio) so the card zooms as one unit.

font.$description: Master font size for the chat card: 18px above the medium breakpoint (~1024px), scaling to a 14px floor through the medium band. The card text inherits this, so text and width shrink together for a cohesive resize.
